hero.title: Ukraine Pipepiles
hero.subtitle:
the first company in Ukraine that exclusively producing tubular sheet piles and beam sheet piles based on the patented MF-Pipe technology developed by SteelWall ISH GmbH (Germany).
Tubular sheet piles and beam sheet piles have been widely used worldwide for many years in almost all infrastructure and hydraulic engineering projects.

Now we produce them in Ukraine.

The production uses
certified steel pipes and I-beams from various manufacturers
+
unique patented sheet pile locks SteelWall ISH GMBH supplied to Ukraine exclusively by STEELWALL UKRAINE (www.steelwallukr.com ymatt24@yahoo.com)

This allows the creation of highly reliable tubular sheet pile systems for complex civil and hydraulic construction projects such as:

• port infrastructure (piers, berths, shoreline reinforcement)
• retaining walls (viaducts, multi-level road interchanges, reinforcement
linear sections of roads, railways, oil and gas pipelines)
• bridge structures (bridge approaches and pier caissons)
• various underground structures and tunnels (horizontal DTH technology)
• deep excavations and multi-level parking structures for civil construction.

The produced piles comply with the technical specifications of Ukraine TU U 24.2-455223116002:2025, specially developed to regulate the production of high-quality and reliable piles.

inProgress.title: Page in progress
inProgress.text: We are working on this section. It will be available soon.

features.title: Piles are driven “lock into lock”, resulting in:
features.secondText: Viaducts, multi-level road interchanges, oil and gas pipelines.

manufacturing.hero:
LLC «UKRTRUBOSHPUNT» manufactures pipe sheet piles with and at the production facilities of LLC «ZSP»which serves as the exclusive contract partner of LLC «UKRTRUBOSHPUNT»

Pipe sheet piles are manufactured in strict compliance with the Ukrainian State Technical Specifications TU U 24.2-455223116-002:2025, specifically developed to regulate the production of high-quality and reliable pipe sheet piles.
